items.title: Trump cancels Iran strikes, claims deal approved at 'highest level' — Truth Social; naval blockade remains; signing time/place 'to be announced shortly'; deal covers US, Israel, Saudi, UAE, Qatar, Turkey, Pakistan, Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan, Egypt
Trump threatens Kharg Island seizure — 'assume total control of their Oil and Gas Markets'; later admits 'not sure America has the stomach'; 90% of Iran crude exports via Kharg
IRGC 2nd night attacks on US bases — Ali Al Salem, Ahmed Al Jaber (Kuwait), Sheikh Isa (Bahrain); 18 targets in 2 waves; claims F-35 hangar destruction at Al-Azraq (Jordan)
Iran declares Hormuz 'closed to all marine traffic' — IRGC Navy attacks 2 tankers attempting transit; CENTCOM continues to deny full closure
Oil prices crash after Trump cancels strikes — WTI $87.71 (-2%), Brent $90.38 (-3%); extended trading: WTI $86.51 (-3.9%), Brent $89.15 (-4.2%); biggest single-day drop since mutual halt
Trump: 'ended the war with Iran' — claims 'great settlement'; Iran has not confirmed; 'subject to finalization of documents'; expects signing in Europe in next few days
Trump whiplash: 'VERY HARD TONIGHT' → strike cancellation in same day — vowed 'bigger and more powerful' action morning, cancelled evening; cited 'slow progress' for 2nd night strikes
트럼프, 이란 추가 공습 계획 전격 철회… 협상 타결 시사 — 이란 최고위급 승인 주장; 해상 봉쇄 유지
Iran denies deal: Fars 'no text approved', FM 'merely speculation', 'no final decision' — contradicts Trump 'finalized' claim
트럼프 '이란 폭격 취소'…뉴욕증시 급등, 나스닥 2.5%↑ — 시장 즉각 반응
'오늘 밤 공격'에서 '공습 취소'로...트럼프의 급선회 — 24시간 내 180도 전환 분석
美·이란, 파국위기서 타결쪽 급변침…'디테일의 악마' 이겨낼까 — 종합 분석
